description: Process status SoT. Keep .users/context/process-status.md mirrored after updates.

current_work.title: NVA state-based speech-engine validation prototype
current_work.note: Canonical resource hierarchy remains state-based: each state binds idle video, talking-body video, cropped face preview, face bbox, and a talking-head video set. The sil/a/i/u/e/o six-clip implementation is preserved only as a verified prototype, not the final continuity contract. Directional mouth-shape transitions may require up to n^2 clips; interpolation or another transition strategy remains possible. Resume after RTX 3090 cascade benchmarking selects the talking-head transition contract. Gestures remain separate single clips.

P04.name: integration_test
P04.deliverable: The held prototype Playwright suite passes 14/14 and builder smoke evidence is recorded. Current nva-core validation still fails the v0.1 migration case because the migrated manifest has no state_engine. Transition-contract tests require revision after the RTX 3090 benchmark.

P05.name: requirements_complete
P05.deliverable: The six-clip state-engine prototype evidence is retained, but final completion is held until RTX 3090 cascade benchmarking selects and validates the talking-head transition contract.
P05.ref: REQ-VM-001..REQ-VM-008, REQ-RES-001..REQ-RES-005, UCT-VM-001..UCT-VM-006, UCT-RES-001..UCT-RES-005, FE-VM-001..FE-VM-007, FE-RES-001..FE-RES-005, FT-VM-001..FT-VM-007, FT-RES-001..FT-RES-005

session_end: 1. Mark completed gates done with deliverables
